executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Focus on these three core workflows: WF1 (Policy Sync - upload and parsing of a policy document), WF2 (Upload Receipt - standard receipt upload and OCR extraction path), and WF3 (Compliance & Fraud Trap - discrepancy routing logic with User Input vs OCR extraction and AI boundary limits). Also test form validation edge cases (negative edge cases, oversized files >5MB), and API processing latency (measure response time of LangChain AI agent for WF1, WF2, and WF3). Constrain ALL tests to localhost only - do not test external deployments. The app is running on http://localhost:3000. Use the Admin Demo quick-login button to authenticate as HR admin (do NOT use mic@example.com credentials directly for HR flows — use the Admin Demo button). Use the Employee Demo quick-login button for employee flows.
